identity: Every normalized package record has a nonempty package name.
version: Every normalized package record has an exact resolved coordinate.
source: The local pair explicitly anchors an index, URL, VCS source, or local source.
integrity: Every record has hashes, a pinned source, or a local source.
resolver_epoch: The lock serializes the format or resolver epoch needed for interpretation.
dependency_edge: The lock serializes at least one package dependency relation.
manifest_agreement: All default direct manifest requirements occur in the lock inventory.
